title: Dhammapada, Chapter 5: The Fool
description: Chapter 5 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 5 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Long is the night to one who is awake. Long is the road to one who is tired. Long is samsara to the foolish who do not know the true teaching.
